_comment: Proposed factor weights v1 (Section 12). Conservative rebalance based on Section 11 backtest IC + per-ticker stratification. Resolves to absolute-sum=1 via rebuild_records_with_weights.

_rationale.filings_recency_signal: dropped (was 0.03) - n=0 paired observations across all horizons; broken data path
_rationale.intraday_breakout_signal: dropped (was 0.04) - fires too rarely (n=10 records); per-ticker IC unstable
_rationale.options_net_flow: cut to 0.05 (was 0.15, heaviest in v0) - headline IC near zero; kept some weight to preserve signal for re-eval after Polygon Options upgrade decision
_rationale.valuation_sales_multiple_vs_growth: cut to 0.03 (was 0.06) - not appearing in IC table at all; never fires for many tickers
_rationale.market_fear_greed_regime: bumped to 0.08 (was 0.03) - best per-ticker validated signal: IC +0.32 at 20d, 91% consistency across 11 tickers
_rationale.industry_relative_strength: bumped to 0.08 (was 0.06) - validated across 9/11 tickers (67% consistency, median IC +0.14 at 20d)
_rationale.peer_relative_valuation: bumped to 0.06 (was 0.04) - 100% sign consistency at 20d, IC +0.14
